<!-- source-hash: 635532c9ff619a1e579b3c2938fd383e -->
Response DTO for returning a paginated list of organizations from the external REST API, wrapping a collection of `OrganizationResponse` objects alongside pagination metadata.

## Key Components

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `organizations` | `List<OrganizationResponse>` | List of organization records |
| `total` | `Integer` | Total number of organizations matching the query |
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo` | Pagination metadata (page number, size, etc.) |

## Usage Example

```java
List<OrganizationResponse> orgList = organizationService.findAll(pageable);

OrganizationsResponse response = OrganizationsResponse.builder()
    .organizations(orgList)
    .total(orgList.size())
    .pageInfo(PageInfo.of(page, size, totalPages))
    .build();
```
